ddt:Target.Name: INVME_E001_200_V1.1
ddt:Target.Description:
Author: ARJUN MUTHU Reference Db :VC1CP010_A201_0700_C1A_V1.4
Vehicle: x1316,x1317 ECU: INVME_E001
------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------- Input documents: DIDs ->DID_List_E0010200(0-0) DTC -> EventList_E0010200(0-0) RID_List -> RID_List_E0010200(0-0)
Historique: ---------------------------------------------------------
05/10/2022 INVME_E001_200_V1.1 (AMU) Removed the DID $1036 Removed the DTC List C073, C07A,D327,DCB0,E141,E14F,E152,E165,E175,E276,EA01,EA02,EA0F Updated DTC Extended Data By Ref -" PF_0005_DEM_CRS_ver00b_rev012 (1)" Deleted the Extended Data Service : 1.IUPR Numerator for lbup diagnostic 2. IUPR Dénominator for lbup diagnostic 3.IUPR Numerator for 3. voices cata diagnostic IUPR Dénominator for 3 voices cata diagnostic 4. IUMPR Numerator 5.IUMPR Denominator
30/06/2022 INVME_E001_200_V1.0 (AMU) --Added Auto Ident $19/0200 DID Added as per the input List - DID_List_E0010200(0-0) DTC Added as per the input List - EventList_E0010200(0-0)

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Power Electronic driver bottom on inverter side
Inverter Power Electronic Driver, Main Control Unit and PCB Temperature
Inverter Main Control Unit and PCB Temperature
Power Electronic driver top on inverter side
Battery Set Point Generator Status v2s - 2
LIN OP Gearbox Oil Pump Unit
Hybrid Electric Vehicle Control unit / ECU
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCMileage at 1st occurrence since last clear
Data.Comment: Description of the extended MileageAtFirstOccurrence(use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: DTCMileage at 1st occurrence since last clear

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCMileage at last occurrence
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrence counter
Data.Comment: Description of the extended OccurenceCounter(use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.IUMPR Numerator
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.IUMPR Denominator
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData(use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCRecord.IUPR
Data.Comment: Status for the IUPR using service $19

Total distance traveled in charge depleting operation with engine off (Lifetime)
the total distance travelled in charge depleting mode with Engine Off (Recent)

the total distance travelled in charge depleting mode with Engine Running (Recent)
Total distance traveled in driver selectable charge increasing operation (Lifetime)
the total distance travelled in Driver Selectable Charge Increasing Operation (Recent)
Bit indicating that the Immobilizer diagnosis is available
Immobilizer diagnosis bit indicating that the engine is not running due to ECM
Immobilizer diagnosis bit indicating that the engine is not running due to BCM secure mode
Immobilizer diagnosis bit indicating that the engine is not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer diagnosis bit indicating that the engine is not running due to a CAN problem with BCM
Byte used to allow Immobilizer diagnosis1
Byte used to allow Immobilizer diagnosis2
Byte used to allow Immobilizer diagnosis3
Engine State (0: Engine stopped, 1: Engine starting, 2: Engine running)
Average Engine Speed from HECM to HEVC

Categorized running distance at city low, city high, road and highway.2

Categorized running distance at city low, city high, road and highway.4
Emotor oil pump speed setpoint in RPM
DID write variable to Activate Can Bench
Gathered distance consists of total running distance and categorized running distance
VIN
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the VIN number.

Record data content and format shall be specified by the vehicle manufacturer.

It shall not be erased when the ECU is reprogrammed.

Data.Name: DTC that caused required freeze frame data storage
OBD requirements to which vehicle or engine is certified.
